Event: The Arcane Adventure
Event Date: 14/05/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: AR409
Star Reader Outfit

Every 8 seconds, one of the following effects triggers:
If the fighter's health is less than 50%, he removes all negative effects from himself, enters a rage for 5 seconds. He increases in size and all his parameters increase by 25% for 5 seconds. The fighter also restores 30% health to himself and all allied fighters within a small radius.
If the fighter's health is more than 50%, he removes 4 random negative effects from all allied fighters and resurrects an allied fighter with 30% health.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
